widgets_values: a cinematic photo of a red apple on a rustic wooden table, soft window light, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed, 35mm
nodes.title: Positive Prompt

widgets_values:
HOW TO USE  (Flux 2 Klein - 100% local & free)

MODE 1 - TEXT TO IMAGE:
  Leave all 3 Reference groups bypassed (they are red/disabled by default).
  Type your prompt, hit Run.

MODE 2 - IMAGE TO IMAGE:
  Enable Reference 1 (select its 4 nodes, press Ctrl+B to un-bypass).
  Load your image in 'Ref 1 image'. Prompt = what you want changed.

MODE 3 - REFERENCE -> IMAGE:
  Enable Reference 1, 2 (and 3) the same way, load a different image in each.
  The model blends/uses all of them. Up to 3 wired here (Flux 2 supports more).

UPSCALE TO 4K (group 5, optional):
  Select the 4 green nodes, press Ctrl+B to enable. 4x model then caps the
  longest side at 3840 = up to 4K, saved as FLUX2_upscaled. Off by default.

TIPS:
  - Guidance 3-5. Steps 20 (try 28-32 for more detail).
  - For MAX quality switch Diffusion Model to flux-2-klein-base-9b-fp8
    AND Text Encoder to qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed (slower, heavier).
  - Change 'Canvas size' AND the width/height in 'Scheduler' to match (keep them equal).
  - Seed widget: set to 'fixed' to reproduce, 'randomize' to explore.
a vintage travel poster that reads "Z-IMAGE", snowy mountains, art deco, bold clean typography, vibrant colors
nodes.title: Positive

widgets_values:
Z-IMAGE TURBO - fast TEXT to IMAGE (local, free)

Near-instant generation (~3-6s) with the cleanest in-image TEXT of any
local model. Great for quick ideas / replacing Midjourney for fast work.

KEY SETTINGS (already set):
  - KSampler: steps 8, CFG 1.0, sampler dpmpp_sde, scheduler beta
    (Turbo model: keep CFG=1, steps 4-10. More steps != much better.)
  - ModelSamplingAuraFlow shift = 3
  - CLIPLoader type MUST be 'lumina2' (Z-Image uses it), encoder qwen_3_4b
  - Negative prompt is ignored at CFG 1 (leave empty).

For best text rendering, describe the exact words in quotes in the prompt.
change the background to a sunny tropical beach, keep the subject unchanged
nodes.title: Edit instruction (positive)

widgets_values:
QWEN-IMAGE-EDIT 2511 - instruction IMAGE EDITING (local, free)

Load an image + type an instruction in 'Edit instruction' -> edited image.
The surgical editor: precise text/object/color/identity edits.

EXAMPLES:  change the jacket to red  |  remove the person on the left  |
  change the sign text to 'OPEN 24H'  |  make it night with neon lights  |
  put this character in a suit (keeps the face)

SETTINGS: steps 20 (raise to 40 for max quality), CFG 4.0, euler/simple.
  Lower CFG (2.5-3)=gentler edits, higher (4-5)=stronger instruction.
  This graph uses the official 2511 wiring (ModelSamplingAuraFlow 3.1 +
  CFGNorm + FluxKontextMultiReferenceLatentMethod) - required, don't remove.

MULTI-IMAGE EDIT: connect more images to image2 / image3 on the encoders
  (e.g. 'put the hat from image2 on the person in image1').
HEAVY 20B model: ~60-170s/image on 16GB (offloads to RAM).
a detailed marble statue, dramatic museum lighting, photorealistic
nodes.title: Positive

widgets_values:
Z-IMAGE + CONTROLNET - structure-controlled generation (local)

Lock the COMPOSITION (pose / depth / edges) of a source image, then
generate something new that follows that structure.

HOW:
  1. Load a control-source image (bottom-left).
  2. AIO_Preprocessor extracts the control map. Pick the type:
       CannyEdgePreprocessor      = outlines (default, no extra download)
       DepthAnythingV2Preprocessor= depth (downloads a small model 1st run)
       DWPreprocessor / OpenposePreprocessor = body pose
  3. Write your prompt. Run.

STRENGTH (ZImageFunControlnet): 0.6-1.0. Lower=looser, higher=stricter.
Uses Z-Image Fun ControlNet via ModelPatchLoader (in models/model_patches)
+ ZImageFunControlnet - NOT the normal ControlNet nodes. Steps 8 / CFG 1.

IMAGE -> TEXT  (Qwen3-VL, 100% local)

Load an image -> get a description / prompt back.

USES:
  - Caption / alt-text for any image
  - PROMPT EXTRACTION: describe a reference you like, then paste the
    text into the Flux 2 or Z-Image prompt box to recreate its style
  - Visual Q&A via 'custom_prompt' (e.g. 'read the text in this image')

PRESETS: Tags / Simple / Detailed / Ultra Detailed / Cinematic /
  Analysis / Short Story / Prompt Refine & Expand.
  Anything typed in custom_prompt overrides the preset.

MODEL: Qwen3VL-8B-Instruct-Q8 (best). Pick a 4B variant for speed.

########  MASTER WORKFLOW  ########

Every capability in ONE file, as separate MODULES (the big coloured boxes).

HOW TO USE:
  1. Only Module A (Flux 2) is ON by default. Everything else is bypassed.
  2. To use another module: click its big group title to select it,
     then press Ctrl+B to ENABLE it. Press Ctrl+B again to turn it OFF.
  3. Turn OFF the module you are done with so two heavy models don't run
     at once (16GB). Each module has its own Save node + prompt.
  4. Module F (4K upscaler) is standalone - load any image, enable, run.

MODULES:
  A Flux 2     - best quality t2i / i2i / multi-reference (+4K group inside)
  B Z-Image    - fastest t2i, best text-in-image (+4K group inside)
  C Qwen-Edit  - 'change/remove/edit' instructions (heavy 20B, +4K inside)
  D ControlNet - lock pose/depth/edges (+4K group inside)
  E Image->Text- describe an image / extract a prompt -> paste into A or B
  F 4K Upscaler- upscale any image up to 3840px

Each generating module ALSO has its own '4K UPSCALE' sub-group (green) -
enable it the same way (Ctrl+B) to save a 4K version of that module's output.
nodes.title: READ ME

groups.title: A) FLUX 2  -  Text->Image / Image->Image / Reference (DEFAULT: ON)
B) Z-IMAGE TURBO  -  fast Text->Image + best in-image text
D) Z-IMAGE + CONTROLNET  -  pose / depth / edge control
F) 4K UPSCALER  -  upscale ANY image up to 4K (independent)
